Subject: TIS-Voucher Kickouts Report: Please begin reviewing this report for
Message:
The TIS upgrade project has provided the addition of a new report called, "TIS-Voucher Kickouts" Several kickouts currently exists on this report for the August 2001 close.  Please remember to review this report for MSA accounts and invalid JIA tables that appear for your companies. Resolving these errors will help expedite the process for all users. 
 
For more information on the TIS-Voucher Kickouts report, please visit tax.enron.com  <http://tax.enron.com/>and click on the Tax Informer  <http://tax.enron.com/TaxInformer3/tinformer.asp>link.  There is a section in Tax Informer that discusses changes to the Ad Hoc database, including the addition of the TIS-Voucher Kickouts report. 
 
For additional questions on this new report, please contact Kelly McCain (ext. 3-4719) or Deborah Heath (ext. 3-5033).
